roa.docketEntryComment: Warrant - Bench Warrant Return 11/30/2022 FTA VETERANS COURT PROGRESS REPORT; 3 OF 4 BWI
Warrant - Bench Warrant Return 08/10/22 FTA VETERANS COURT PROGRESS REPORT

/CAL:VJC PROGRESS REPORT/CONTD: PROC RE $1,000 BW STAY FROM 05-25-22/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCHWARRANT IS ORDERED AND STAYED TO06-01-22/X: BAIL SET AT $ 1,000/DOPC/

/CAL:VJC PROGRESS REPORT/DEF:PRESENT VIA ZOOM/EMMOD:CURFEW,REMAIN CONFINED WITHIN THE INTERIOR PREMISES OF RESIDENCE DURING THE FOLLOWING HOURS:1PMTO 9AM/X:ALL OTHER CONDITIONS OF ELECTRONIC MONITORING REMAIN THE SAME/CONTD: VJC PROGRESS REPORT/DOP/

/CAL:ISSUE TRANSPORTATION ORDER/X:TRANSPORTATION ORDER SIGNED AND FILED/STWPX/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/DEF:SHOULD BE TRANSPORTED TO SAFE HEAVEN FOR HOUSING,PROGRAMMING AND TREATMENT PLAN/DEF:MUST COMPLY WITH CURFEW, REMAIN CONFINED WITHING THE INTERIORPREMISESOF RESIDENCE,SAFE HEAVEN, DURING THE FOLLOWING HOURS NOON TO 9AM/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:STATUS OF PLACEMENT/DOP/

/CAL: INSTRUCTION, ARRAIGNMENT, PLEA, & COUNSEL/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE DECLARES A CONFLICT,/CON: RICHARD SHIKMAN/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW60/LDPX: 07-01-22 (60TH)/BAIL: 25,000/X: BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE,/CONTD: VJC ELIGIBILITY/DOP/
/CAL: RECEIPT OF ASSESSMENT/COLT/CONTD: STATUS  OF TRANSPORT/DOPU: IN A PROGRAM/
/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN/DAWT/BWDNC/SAWD/SHER/BAIL:1,000/CTORD: IN CUSTODY ASSESSMENT/CONTD: RECEIPT OF ASSESSMENT/
/CAL:PROC RE $1,000 BW STAYED FROM 05-25-22/BWLIFT:05-25-22/FTA/OREVKD/BWI/BAIL:1,000/BWNUM:1ST/X: 4 OF 4 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE/NIGHTSER
/CAL: STATUS OF 22004094 & DECISION ON VJC/CON: RICHARD SHIKMAN/X: ON 05-02-22 IN M12/CONTD: ISSUE TRANSPORT ORDER WITH EM/
